bird.name: Sardinian warbler
bird.summary: The Sardinian warbler (Curruca melanocephala) is a common and widespread Sylviidae warbler from the Mediterranean region. Like most Curruca…

locations.name: 北非
locations.summary: 与撒哈拉以南非洲相对，北非（英语：North Africa或Northern Africa）即非洲大陆北部地区，习惯上为苏丹热带草原以北非洲广大区域。联合国定义的“北非”，是指撒哈拉沙漠以北地区，包括埃及、利比亚、阿尔及利亚、突尼斯、摩洛…

locations.name: 大不列顛島
locations.summary: 大不列颠岛（英語：Great Britain；蘇格蘭蓋爾語：Breatainn Mhòr；威爾斯語：Prydain Fawr；康瓦爾語：Breten Veur）是一个位于欧洲西北部的岛屿，面積209,331平方公里，是全世界第九大岛屿，也…

relations.subject: Sardinian warbler
relations.evidence: This small passerine bird, unlike most "warblers", is not particularly migratory, but some birds winter in North Africa, and it occurs as a vagrant well away from the breeding range, as far as Great Britain
